title: Vrtl Pirates contact form — 'Set Sail With Us'
html:
The "Set Sail With Us" contact form at the bottom of vrtlpirates.com — Name / Email / Company / "Tell us about your SEO/AEO needs..." footer with About / Privacy / Terms links. Captured during the Oct 21–22 telnyx verification scramble that demanded those exact compliance pages exist.
